Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $104,897,530Details
International Box Office $80,838,882
Worldwide Box Office $185,736,412
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,226,821
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,127,372
Total $17,354,193
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After the highs of winning the World Championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren’t job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, this group of awesome nerds will come together to make some music, and some questionable decisions, one last time.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,928,525 (19.0% of total gross)
Legs:5.26 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,447 opening theaters/3,468 max. theaters, 5.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $139,011,044

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2017 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: December 21st, 2017 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
December 21st, 2017 (Wide) (Switzerland)
December 21st, 2017 (Wide) (Slovenia)
December 21st, 2017 (Wide) (Slovakia)
December 22nd, 2017 (Wide) (Poland)
Video Release: March 20th, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual content, language and some action.
(Rating bulletin 2485 (Cert #51145), 7/19/2017)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Franchise: Pitch Perfect
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Plot point: Musicians, Romance, Singers, Tournament
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Gold Circle Films, Brownstone
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
